name: Addressee Premium Interest Signal Audit

yandex_metrika_calls: ym(108416207, 'reachGoal', event, properties) on every emit()
analytics_transport_summary.production_guard: if (!this.initialized) return — before handlers and external calls
analytics_transport_summary.backend_on_failure: silent — try/catch in safeEmit, empty catch in ym reachGoal

addressee_premium_hook_click.payload: sanitizePremiumPayload({ hook_id, offer_id, language }) — 3 fields only

addressee_pricing_view.note: PremiumBlock does not call trackAddresseePricingView — only trackAddresseePremiumHookView

addressee_pricing_interest_click.trigger: handleOfferClick dispatches by offerId — clean-docx and office-pack routes map to this event

pii_privacy_confirmation.sanitizePremiumPayload_function: present at line 304, iterates PREMIUM_HOOK_ALLOWED_KEYS only

stage_20_3_options.description: Use Yandex Metrika's existing goal funnels to track premium hook views and clicks. Set up goals for each premium event in Yandex Metrika's interface.
stage_20_3_options.pros: No code changes needed, no backend, immediate, Yandex already receives events
stage_20_3_options.cons: Requires Yandex account access, conversion funnel setup in Metrika UI

stage_20_3_options.description: Add an lightweight endpoint to apifeedback.qten.workers.dev that accepts anonymous interest signals (offer_id, hook_id, timestamp, sessionId, language). No PII.
stage_20_3_options.pros: Own backend, full control, can aggregate by offer_id/session
stage_20_3_options.cons: Requires Worker modification (needs separate approval), adds complexity

stage_20_3_options.description: Add a simple counter endpoint that increments a per-offer-id counter in D1. Only counts clicks, no PII stored.
stage_20_3_options.pros: No PII, simple, can query which offers are most clicked
stage_20_3_options.cons: Requires D1 write access (needs separate approval), minimal signal

recommendations.recommended_next_step: Option A — use Yandex Metrika's built-in goal tracking for premium hook events. No code changes, no backend work, provides immediate measurable signal. Add goals for each of the 7 premium events in Yandex Metrika interface.
recommendations.immediate_action: Configure Yandex Metrika goals for: addressee_premium_hook_view, addressee_premium_hook_click, addressee_office_pack_interest_click, addressee_batch_interest_click, addressee_saved_presets_interest_click

push_status: nothing to commit — audit only, no code changes
